mapper.select: SELECT id, alert_type, description, CAST(location AS CHAR) AS location, occurred_at FROM alerts ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alerts WHERE DATE(occurred_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alerts WHERE DATE(occurred_at) = CURDATE() AND alert_type = #{alertType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alerts (alert_type, description, location, occurred_at) VALUES (#{alertType}, #{description}, #{location}, #{occurredAt})
